ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user, typically a username or ID */,
  "user_identity" TEXT /* Identity of the user on the platform, including a unique tag */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Digital wallet or address associated with the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the user account was created */,
  "date_last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the user was last active on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* The user's email address for communication and verification purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number for additional verification and communication */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* A categorization of the user (e.g., basic, premium, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_tracking" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user receiving the rewards */,
  "praise_reward" REAL /* Amount of praise rewarded to the user */,
  "quant_reward" REAL /* Quantified reward amount assigned to the user */,
  "nr_of_praises_quantified" INTEGER /* Number of praises quantified for the user */,
  "rewardboard_reward" REAL /* Additional rewards from the reward board */,
  "total_to_receive" REAL /* Total amount the user is eligible to receive */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* A categorization of the reward (e.g., praise, quantitative, achievement) */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the reward */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the reward was earned */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* The status of the reward (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reward_category" TEXT /* A categorization of the reward (e.g., engagement, contribution, achievement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* The name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reward_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who earned the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the reward was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reward_history_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES reward_tracking ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reward_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who received the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward distributed */,
  "date_distributed" TEXT /* Timestamp to track when the reward was distributed */,
  "amount_distributed" REAL /* The amount of the reward distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_distributions_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES reward_tracking ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_distributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* The name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
